headline: Drugmakers petition Supreme Court to restore mifepristone mail-order access
summary: Investing.com -- Danco Laboratories and GenBioPro have filed emergency applications with the U.S. Supreme Court seeking to reinstate mail-order access to the abortion pill mifepristone, as first reported by Reuters.
